economic_notes: First Nation holds equity interests in six business partnerships: Wahkohtowin Development LP (33.33%), Three Nations Development LP (33.33%), Mushkegowuk Regional Economic Development LP (12.5%), Nipiy-WOF HydroKap LP (20%), Northeast Superior First Nations Investment LP (33.33%), and Opeewin LP (33.33%). Wholly owns 2507503 Ontario Inc as a capital asset holding company. Operates a Gas Bar and Chapleau Cree Garage. Receives Goldcorp revenue resource share. Per capita distributions of $4,487,715 paid to members.
notes: Audit is QUALIFIED because financial information for First Nation business partnerships was not available for the year ended March 31, 2023; all partnership figures were presented using March 31, 2022 data. This affects the investment in partnerships balance, share of earnings, accumulated surplus, net financial assets, and cash flows. The accumulated surplus per Note 12 is $31,762,571 (including accumulated remeasurement gains of $128,893), while Exhibit B shows $31,633,678 — the difference is the accumulated remeasurement gains reported separately. Prior year accumulated surplus similarly differs: Note 12 shows $27,099,066 vs Exhibit B $26,700,611. Net financial assets of $12,269,283 reported. Long-term debt principal repayment next year is $381,314 per schedule. Annual debt service shown is principal payments only ($29,727). Restricted cash of $134,122 per CMHC replacement and operating reserve requirements. Segmented revenue total of $21,111,579 differs from statement total of $20,468,314 due to inter-segment eliminations or reclassifications.
warnings: Qualified audit opinion issued — financial statements may not fully reflect true position
